title: I Fell in Love with a Z-Grade Director in Brooklyn
original_title: I Fell in Love with a Z-Grade Director in Brooklyn
overview: A jaded Japanese movie star stranded in NYC without money or phone meets a passionate indie filmmaker and his crew, leading to an unexpected creative journey that could reignite her love for cinema.
